title: Karpathy Bigram explained in 10min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents a ten-minute tutorial on Bigram Language Models, drawing from Andrej Karpathy's explanation. The video covers tokenization, embedding, vocabulary, loss functions, cross-entropy, softmax, and optimization as foundational concepts for understanding how language models process tokens and prepare for attention mechanisms and GPT.
writeup: This ten-minute tutorial walks through a Bigram Language Model following Andrej Karpathy's explanation, covering tokenization, embedding, vocabulary, loss functions, cross-entropy, softmax, and optimization (including AdamW and backpropagation). It frames these as the foundational mechanics behind how language models process tokens. The stated payoff: these basics set up later understanding of attention mechanisms and GPT.
